CustomField.description: Aggregate currency amount discounted on this line by the apply flow. Written by the pricing pre-hook from Pending Promo_Code_Item__c records. The pricing-procedure Formula element subtracts this value from NetPrice (floored at 0).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Aggregated promotional adjustment applied to this line in the line's currency. Populated by pricing pre-hook by summing per-code Applied_Discount_Amount__c values across all Pending Promo_Code_Items for the line. The Formula pricing element subtracts this from NetPrice.
CustomField.label: Promotion Value
